events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday, known for his iconic sound and songwriting.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's Brian May! What's your favourite guitar solo from the man himself?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Rock'n'Roll Legend
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger! What's your top Rolling Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV officially launched, forever changing the music industry, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being its very first music video.

angles.name: MTV's Debut
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV first hit screens, kicking off with The Buggles. What was your favourite music video from the early days?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis' debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released in 1994, becoming a landmark of Britpop.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Celebrating the anniversary of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' album! What's your go-to track from this Britpop classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969, featuring legendary acts.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Remembering the legendary Woodstock Festival, which kicked off on this day in 1969. Three days of peace, love, and music that changed the world.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death (would have been 91)
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley on the anniversary of his passing. His music continues to inspire generations.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death (would have been 55)
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55. He was shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and died on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the enduring legacy of Tupac Shakur. His impact on music and culture remains profound.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death (would have been 84)
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84. He passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix on the anniversary of his passing. A true guitar icon.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in 1969, featuring classic tracks like 'Come Together' and 'Something'. The UK release was September 26, 1969, with the US release on October 1, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Celebrating the timeless masterpiece, The Beatles' 'Abbey Road'. What's your favourite track from this legendary album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Frontwoman
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: LG's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite Oasis anthem?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was released as a single on October 11, 1971 (UK), from the album of the same name released on September 9, 1971 (US).

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: Today marks an anniversary for John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine'. A powerful message that still resonates.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music players.

angles.name: iPod's Debut
angles.copy: Remember the first time you got an iPod? Today marks the anniversary of Apple's revolutionary music player from 2001!

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Happy Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite Bond and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: Remembering the iconic John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message live on.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The acclaimed English actor, comedian, and writer John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite Monty Python sketch or Fawlty Towers moment?

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album' (1968)
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, famously known as 'The White Album', was released on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: Celebrating the anniversary of The Beatles' iconic 'White Album'. Which track from this double LP is your favourite?
